name: doctrine-consistent CLI change
diff:
diff --git a/src/tripwire/cli.py b/src/tripwire/cli.py
--- a/src/tripwire/cli.py
+++ b/src/tripwire/cli.py
@@ -1,6 +1,10 @@
 import argparse
 
 def build_parser():
     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
+    parser.add_argument('--prompt-only', action='store_true')
     return parser
 
 def main(argv=None):
     parser = build_parser()
     args = parser.parse_args(argv)
+    if args.prompt_only:
+        print('Review prompt')
+        return 0
     return 0
